Wedding Group Perks

The suit or tux is free for grooms or nearlyweds with a group of 5+. We organize the party and manage orders so you get perfect wedding attire, easy.

Get Started

Perfect Fit Guaranteed

Looking your best starts with the right fit. As the most size-inclusive online suiting retailer across both our men's and women's collections, we've got something perfectly suited for you.

Start the Fit Finder

Free Fabric Swatches

Take the guesswork out of matching your look to your vision. Order fabric swatches to ensure color and coordination throughout your event. Sign up to get 3 for free.

Order Swatches

Love from our customers

We're a fan-favorite for a reason, but don't take our word for it. From thousands of 5-star reviews, here are a few.

1 of 5

A breeze

Working with SuitShop was stress-free. So glad that we found you all. The SuitShop team was super helpful in answering our questions, and the wedding group dashboard made everything a breeze. The suits looked absolutely amazing.

Brittni

Vision come to life

I cannot stress enough how pumped I was with the final look. You guys really made my vision come to life, and I couldn't be more hyped! Thank you for being super easy to work with and helpful!

Devonte

Perfect fit

I looked and looked for a tan suit… the fit was perfect, which is a tall task. Customer service was great, so polite and helpful. I could not have asked for a better experience. Now the cost… WOW so great for the quality of the suit. I can\'t wait to wear it again.

Aaron

A rare gem

Couldn't have been more perfect—a rare gem these days.. In the end, I went with a tuxedo that brings me a smile just thinking about it. I cannot recommend this experience highly enough. Thank you a thousand times over.

Danny

Much better

The process was great. The suit fit and felt wonderful. Much better than suits that I\'ve paid 2-3x for.

Christopher
1 of 5
